Document routes: POST, PUT, DELETE, GET /documents\n2\t//!\n3\t//! Implements the write path per plan §2:\n4\t//! - Hash primary key to get shard ID\n5\t//! - Inject _miroir_shard field\n6\t//! - Fan out to RG × RF nodes\n7\t//! - Per-group quorum (floor(RF/2)+1)\n8\t//! - X-Miroir-Degraded header on any group missing quorum\n9\t//! - 503 miroir_no_quorum only when no group met quorum\n10\t\n11\tuse axum::{\n12\t    extract::{Path, State},\n13\t    http::{HeaderMap, HeaderValue, StatusCode},\n14\t    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n15\t};\n16\tuse miroir_core::{\n17\t    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n18\t    router::{shard_for_key, write_targets},\n19\t    scatter::{Scatter, ScatterRequest},\n20\t};\n21\tuse serde_json::Value;\n22\t\n23\tuse crate::{\n24\t    error_response::ErrorResponse,\n25\t    scatter::HttpScatter,\n26\t    state::ProxyState,\n27\t};\n28\t\n29\t/// Documents router.\n30\tpub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n31\t    axum::Router::new()\n32\t        .route(\"/:index\", axum::routing::post(add_documents))\n33\t        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::post(add_documents))\n34\t        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::put(update_documents))\n35\t        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::delete(delete_documents))\n36\t        .route(\"/:index/documents/:id\", axum::routing::get(get_document))\n37\t        .route(\"/:index/documents/:id\", axum::routing::delete(delete_document))\n38\t}\n39\t\n40\t/// Extract the primary key field from documents or headers.\n41\t/// First checks the index settings, then falls back to headers and defaults.\n42\tasync fn get_primary_key(\n43\t    state: &ProxyState,\n44\t    index: &str,\n45\t    documents: &[Value],\n46\t    headers: &HeaderMap,\n47\t) -> Result<String, ErrorResponse> {\n48\t    // First, try to get primary key from index settings\n49\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n50\t\n51\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n52\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n53\t            let request = ScatterRequest {\n54\t                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n55\t                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}\", index),\n56\t                body: vec![],\n57\t                headers: vec![],\n58\t            };\n59\t\n60\t            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n61\t\n62\t            if let Ok(result) = scatter.scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await {\n63\t                if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n64\t                    if resp.status == 200 {\n65\t                        if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n66\t                            if let Some(pk) = json.get(\"primaryKey\").and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {\n67\t                                return Ok(pk.to_string());\n68\t                            }\n69\t                        }\n70\t                    }\n71\t                }\n72\t            }\n73\t        }\n74\t    }\n75\t\n76\t    // Check for primary key in query string/header\n77\t    if let Some(pk) = headers.get(\"X-Meiroil-Primary-Key\") {\n78\t        if let Ok(pk_str) = pk.to_str() {\n79\t            return Ok(pk_str.to_string());\n80\t        }\n81\t    }\n82\t\n83\t    // Try to infer from first document\n84\t    if let Some(doc) = documents.first() {\n85\t        // Common primary key field names to try\n86\t        for candidate in &[\"id\", \"Id\", \"ID\", \"_id\", \"key\", \"Key\", \"pk\"] {\n87\t            if doc.get(*candidate).is_some() {\n88\t                return Ok(candidate.to_string());\n89\t            }\n90\t        }\n91\t    }\n92\t\n93\t    // Default to \"id\"\n94\t    Ok(\"id\".to_string())\n95\t}\n96\t\n97\t/// POST /:index/documents - Add or replace documents.\n98\tasync fn add_documents(\n99\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n100\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n101\t    headers: HeaderMap,\n102\t    body: Vec<Value>,\n103\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n104\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n105\t\n106\t    // Get primary key for the index\n107\t    let primary_key = get_primary_key(&state, &index, &body, &headers).await?;\n108\t\n109\t    // Inject _miroir_shard into each document and group by shard\n110\t    let mut docs_by_shard: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n111\t\n112\t    for mut doc in body {\n113\t        let pk_value = doc\n114\t            .get(primary_key.as_str())\n115\t            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n116\t            .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(format!(\"Missing primary key field '{primary_key}'\")))?;\n117\t\n118\t        let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, state.config.shards);\n119\t\n120\t        // Inject _miroir_shard field\n121\t        if let Some(obj) = doc.as_object_mut() {\n122\t            obj.insert(\"_miroir_shard\".to_string(), Value::Number(shard_id.into()));\n123\t        }\n124\t\n125\t        docs_by_shard.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(doc);\n126\t    }\n127\t\n128\t    // For each shard, scatter write to all RG × RF nodes\n129\t    let mut all_responses: Vec<Value> = Vec::new();\n130\t    let mut any_degraded = false;\n131\t    let mut any_success = false;\n132\t\n133\t    for (shard_id, docs) in docs_by_shard {\n134\t        let targets = write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n135\t\n136\t        if targets.is_empty() {\n137\t            return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n138\t        }\n139\t\n140\t        // Build request body\n141\t        let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&docs).unwrap_or_default();\n142\t\n143\t        let request = ScatterRequest {\n144\t            method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n145\t            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents\", index),\n146\t            body: body_bytes,\n147\t            headers: vec![],\n148\t        };\n149\t\n150\t        let scatter = HttpScatter::with_retry_cache(\n151\t            (*state.client).clone(),\n152\t            state.config.server.request_timeout_ms,\n153\t            (*state.retry_cache).clone(),\n154\t        );\n155\t        let result = scatter\n156\t            .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n157\t            .await\n158\t            .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n159\t\n160\t        // Check quorum per replica group\n161\t        let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n162\t        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n163\t\n164\t        // Group responses by replica group\n165\t        let mut groups: std::collections::HashMap<u32, usize> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n166\t        for resp in &result.responses {\n167\t            let node = topology.node(&resp.node_id).unwrap();\n168\t            *groups.entry(node.replica_group).or_insert(0) += 1;\n169\t        }\n170\t\n171\t        // Check if each group met quorum\n172\t        for (_group_id, count) in &groups {\n173\t            if *count < quorum {\n174\t                any_degraded = true;\n175\t            } else {\n176\t                any_success = true;\n177\t            }\n178\t        }\n179\t\n180\t        // Merge responses\n181\t        for resp in result.responses {\n182\t            if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n183\t                all_responses.push(json);\n184\t            }\n185\t        }\n186\t    }\n187\t\n188\t    // If no group met quorum, return 503\n189\t    if !any_success {\n190\t        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(0));\n191\t    }\n192\t\n193\t    // Build response with proper task UID\n194\t    let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n195\t    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n196\t        \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n197\t        \"indexUid\": index,\n198\t        \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n199\t        \"type\": \"documentAdditionOrUpdate\",\n200\t        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n201\t    });\n202\t\n203\t    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(202);\n204\t\n205\t    // Add degraded header if any group was degraded\n206\t    if any_degraded {\n207\t        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n208\t            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n209\t        }\n210\t    }\n211\t\n212\t    Ok(builder.body(Json(response_body).into_response().into_body()).unwrap())\n213\t}\n214\t\n215\t/// PUT /:index/documents - Update documents.\n216\tasync fn update_documents(\n217\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n218\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n219\t    headers: HeaderMap,\n220\t    body: Vec<Value>,\n221\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n222\t    // Same logic as POST, just (*state.client).clone(),\n274\t            state.config.server.request_timeout_ms,\n275\t            (*state.retry_cache).clone(),\n276\t        );\n277\t        let result = scatter\n278\t            .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n279\t            .await\n280\t            .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n281\t\n282\t        //      *groups.entry(node.replica_group).or_insert(0) += 1;\n290\t        }\n291\t\n292\t        for (_group_id, count) in &groups {\n293\t            if *count < quorum {\n294\t Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(0));\n303\t    }\n304\t\n305\t    let task_uid = 1;\n306\t    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n307\t        \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n308\t        \"indexUid\": State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n403\t    Path((index, id)): Path<(String, String)>,\n404\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n405\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n406\t\n407\t    // miroir_core::router::query_group(query_seq, state.config.replica_groups);\n411\t\n412\t    let group = topology\n413\t        .group(group_id)\n414\t        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\"Group {} not found\", group_id)))?;\n415\t\n416\t    let _shard_id = shard_for_key(&id, state.config.shards);\n417\t    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n418\t\n419\t    // Build covering set for this shard\n420\t    let covering = miroir_core::router::covering_set(1, group, rf, query_seq);\n421\t\n422\t    // Query the node responsible for this shard\n423\t    let target = covering\n424\t        .first()\n425\t        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes in covering set\"))?;\n426\t\n427\t    let request = ScatterRequest {\n428\t        method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n429\t        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents/{}\", index, id),\n430\t        body: vec![],\n431\t        headers: vec![],\n432\t    };\n433\t\n434\t    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n435\t    let result = scatter\n436\t        .scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Error)\n437\t        .await\n438\t        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n439\t\n440\t    if result.responses.is_empty() {\n441\t        return Err(ErrorResponse::document_not_found(&id));\n442\t    }\n443\t\n444\t    let resp = &result.responses[0];\n445\t\n446\t    // Parse response body as JSON and strip _miroir_shard\n447\t    let mut body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n448\t        .unwrap_or_else(|_| serde_json::json!({}));\n449\t    if let Some(obj) = body.as_object_mut() {\n450\t        obj.remove(\"_miroir_shard\");\n451\t    }\n452\t\n453\t    let status = StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(StatusCode::OK);\n454\t    Ok((status, Json(body)).into_response())\n455\t}\n456\t\n457\t#[cfg(test)]\n458\tmod tests {\n459\t    use super::*;\n460\t\n461\t    #[test]\n462\t    fn test_document_shard_hashing() {\n463\t        // Test that same ID always maps to same shard\n464\t        let id1 = \"test-doc-123\";\n465\t        let id2 = \"test-doc-123\";\n466\t        let id3 = \"different-doc\";\n467\t\n468\t        // These should be deterministic\n469\t        let shard1 = shard_for_key(id1, 64);\n470\t        let shard2 = shard_for_key(id2, 64);\n471\t        let shard3 = shard_for_key(id3, 64);\n472\t\n473\t        assert_eq!(shard1, shard2, \"Same ID should map to same shard\");\n474\t        assert_ne!(shard1, shard3, \"Different IDs should likely map to different shards\");\n475\t    }\n476\t\n477\t    #[test]\n478\t    fn test_document_shard_uniformity() {\n479\t        // Test that documents distribute reasonably evenly\n480\t        let mut shard_counts = vec![0usize; 64];\n481\t\n482\t        for i in 0..1000 {\n483\t            let id = format!(\"doc-{}\", i);\n484\t            let shard = shard_for_key(&id, 64);\n485\t            shard_counts[shard as usize] += 1;\n486\t        }\n487\t\n488\t        // Check that each shard got at least some documents\n489\t        // (with 1000 docs and 64 shards, most should get at least 10-20)\n490\t        let min_count = *shard_counts.iter().min().unwrap();\n491\t        let max_count = *shard_counts.iter().max().unwrap();\n492\t\n493\t        assert!(min_count >= 5, \"Minimum shard count too low: {}\", min_count);\n494\t        assert!(max_count <= 30, \"Maximum shard count too high: {}\", max_count);\n495\t    }\n496\t}\n497\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcea9875-42f3-40bf-9abf-7c9e9cc539b7","uuid":"32a77759-40c6-441a-9024-4adc77d83ed6","timestamp":"2026-05-09T16:04:25.186Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/miroir/crates/miroir-proxy/src/routes/documents.rs","content":"//! Document routes: POST, PUT, DELETE, GET /documents\n//!\n//! Implements the write path per plan §2:\n//! - Hash primary key to get shard ID\n//! - Inject _miroir_shard field\n//! - Fan out to RG × RF nodes\n//! - Per-group quorum (floor(RF/2)+1)\n//! - X-Miroir-Degraded header on any group missing quorum\n//! - 503 miroir_no_quorum only when no group met quorum\n\nuse axum::{\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    http::{HeaderMap, HeaderValue, StatusCode},\n    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n};\nuse miroir_core::{\n    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    router::{shard_for_key, write_targets},\n    scatter::{Scatter, ScatterRequest},\n};\nuse serde_json::Value;\n\nuse crate::{\n    error_response::ErrorResponse,\n    scatter::HttpScatter,\n    state::ProxyState,\n};\n\n/// Documents router.\npub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n    axum::Router::new()\n        .route(\"/:index\", axum::routing::post(add_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::post(add_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::put(update_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::delete(delete_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents/:id\", axum::routing::get(get_document))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents/:id\", axum::routing::delete(delete_document))\n}\n\n/// Extract the primary key field from documents or headers.\n/// First checks the index settings, then falls back to headers and defaults.\nasync fn get_primary_key(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    index: &str,\n    documents: &[Value],\n    headers: &HeaderMap,\n) -> Result<String, ErrorResponse> {\n    // First, try to get primary key from index settings\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}\", index),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            if let Ok(result) = scatter.scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await {\n                if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                    if resp.status == 200 {\n                        if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n                            if let Some(pk) = json.get(\"primaryKey\").and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {\n                                return Ok(pk.to_string());\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Check for primary key in query string/header\n    if let Some(pk) = headers.get(\"X-Meiroil-Primary-Key\") {\n        if let Ok(pk_str) = pk.to_str() {\n            return Ok(pk_str.to_string());\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Try to infer from first document\n    if let Some(doc) = documents.first() {\n        // Common primary key field names to try\n        for candidate in &[\"id\", \"Id\", \"ID\", \"_id\", \"key\", \"Key\", \"pk\"] {\n            if doc.get(*candidate).is_some() {\n                return Ok(candidate.to_string());\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Default to \"id\"\n    Ok(\"id\".to_string())\n}\n\n/// POST /:index/documents - Add or replace documents.\nasync fn add_documents(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    headers: HeaderMap,\n    body: Vec<Value>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Get primary key for the index\n    let primary_key = get_primary_key(&state, &index, &body, &headers).await?;\n\n    // Inject _miroir_shard into each document and group by shard\n    let mut docs_by_shard: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for mut doc in body {\n        let pk_value = doc\n            .get(primary_key.as_str())\n            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n            .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(format!(\"Missing primary key field '{primary_key}'\")))?;\n\n        let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, state.config.shards);\n\n        // Inject _miroir_shard field\n        if let Some(obj) = doc.as_object_mut() {\n            obj.insert(\"_miroir_shard\".to_string(), Value::Number(shard_id.into()));\n        }\n\n        docs_by_shard.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(doc);\n    }\n\n    // For each shard, scatter write to all RG × RF nodes\n    let mut all_responses: Vec<Value> = Vec::new();\n    let mut any_degraded = false;\n    let mut any_success = false;\n\n    for (shard_id, docs) in docs_by_shard {\n        let targets = write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n\n        if targets.is_empty() {\n            return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n        }\n\n        // Build request body\n        let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&docs).unwrap_or_default();\n\n        let request = ScatterRequest {\n            method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents\", index),\n            body: body_bytes,\n            headers: vec![],\n        };\n\n        let scatter = HttpScatter::with_retry_cache(\n            (*state.client).clone(),\n            state.config.server.request_timeout_ms,\n            (*state.retry_cache).clone(),\n        );\n        let result = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n            .await\n            .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n        // Check quorum per replica group\n        let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n        // Group responses by replica group\n        let mut groups: std::collections::HashMap<u32, usize> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n        for resp in &result.responses {\n            let node = topology.node(&resp.node_id).unwrap();\n            *groups.entry(node.replica_group).or_insert(0) += 1;\n        }\n\n        // Check if each group met quorum\n        for (_group_id, count) in &groups {\n            if *count < quorum {\n                any_degraded = true;\n            } else {\n                any_success = true;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Merge responses\n        for resp in result.responses {\n            if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n                all_responses.push(json);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If no group met quorum, return 503\n    if !any_success {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(0));\n    }\n\n    // Build response with proper task UID\n    let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n        \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n        \"indexUid\": index,\n        \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n        \"type\": \"documentAdditionOrUpdate\",\n        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n    });\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(202);\n\n    // Add degraded header if any group was degraded\n    if any_degraded {\n        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder.body(Json(response_body).into_response().into_body()).unwrap())\n}\n\n/// PUT /:index/documents - Update documents.\nasync fn update_documents(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    headers: HeaderMap,\n    body: Vec<Value>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    // Same logic as POST, just different type\n    add_documents(State(state), Path(index), headers, body).await\n}\n\n/// DELETE /:index/documents - Delete documents by batch.\nasync fn delete_documents(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    body: Value,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Extract filter or IDs from request body\n    let ids = body\n        .get(\"ids\")\n        .and_then(|v| v.as_array())\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"Missing 'ids' field in delete request\"))?;\n\n    // Group by shard\n    let mut docs_by_shard: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<String>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for id_val in ids {\n        let id = id_val\n            .as_str()\n            .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"ID must be a string\"))?;\n\n        let shard_id = shard_for_key(id, state.config.shards);\n        docs_by_shard.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(id.to_string());\n    }\n\n    // For each shard, scatter delete to all RG × RF nodes\n    let mut any_degraded = false;\n    let mut any_success = false;\n\n    for (shard_id, ids) in docs_by_shard {\n        let targets = write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n\n        if targets.is_empty() {\n            return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n        }\n\n        let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&serde_json::json!({ \"ids\": ids })).unwrap_or_default();\n\n        let request = ScatterRequest {\n            method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents/delete\", index),\n            body: body_bytes,\n            headers: vec![],\n        };\n\n        let scatter = HttpScatter::with_retry_cache(\n            (*state.client).clone(),\n            state.config.server.request_timeout_ms,\n            (*state.retry_cache).clone(),\n        );\n        let result = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n            .await\n            .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n        // Check quorum per replica group\n        let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n        let mut groups: std::collections::HashMap<u32, usize> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n        for resp in &result.responses {\n            let node = topology.node(&resp.node_id).unwrap();\n            *groups.entry(node.replica_group).or_insert(0) += 1;\n        }\n\n        for (_group_id, count) in &groups {\n            if *count < quorum {\n                any_degraded = true;\n            } else {\n                any_success = true;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    if !any_success {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(0));\n    }\n\n    let task_uid = 1;\n    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n        \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n        \"indexUid\": index,\n        \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n        \"type\": \"documentDeletion\",\n        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n    });\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(202);\n\n    if any_degraded {\n        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder.body(Json(response_body).into_response().into_body()).unwrap())\n}\n\n/// DELETE /:index/documents/:id - Delete a single document.\nasync fn delete_document(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path((index, id)): Path<(String, String)>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    let shard_id = shard_for_key(&id, state.config.shards);\n    let targets = write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n\n    if targets.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n    }\n\n    let body_bytes =\n        serde_json::to_vec(&serde_json::json!({ \"ids\": [id] })).unwrap_or_default();\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents/delete\", index),\n        body: body_bytes,\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n    let result = scatter\n        .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Check quorum\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n    let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n    let mut groups: std::collections::HashMap<u32, usize> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n    for resp in &result.responses {\n        let node = topology.node(&resp.node_id).unwrap();\n        *groups.entry(node.replica_group).or_insert(0) += 1;\n    }\n\n    let mut any_degraded = false;\n    let mut any_success = false;\n\n    for (_group_id, count) in &groups {\n        if *count < quorum {\n            any_degraded = true;\n        } else {\n            any_success = true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    if !any_success {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n      \"type\": \"documentDeletion\",\n        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n    });\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(202);\n\n    if any_degraded {\n        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder.body(Json(response_body).into_response().into_body()).unwrap())\n}\n\n/// GET /:index/documents/:id - Get a single document by ID.\nasync fn get_document(\n    State(state): replica group\n    // Use the query group (round-robin)\n    let query_seq = state.next_query_seq();\n    let group_id = miroir_core::router::query_group(query_seq, state.config.replica_groups);\n\n state.config.shards);\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n\n    // Build covering set for this shard\n    let covering = miroir_core::router::covering_set(1, group, rf, query_seq);\n\n    // Query the node responsible for this shard\n    let target = covering\n        .first()\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes in covering set\"))?;\n\n test_document_shard_hashing() {\n        // Test that same ID always maps to same shard\n        let id1 = \"test-doc-123\";\n        let id2 = \"test-doc-123\";\n        let id3 = \"different-doc\";\n\n        // These should be deterministic\n        let shard1 = shard_for_key(id1, 64);\n        let shard2 = shard_for_key(id2, 64);\n        let shard3 = shard_for_key(id3, use std::collections::HashMap;\n376\t\n377\t    let mut merged: HashMap<String, HashMap<String, u64>> = HashMap::new();\n378\t\n379\t    for dist in distributions {\n380\t        if let Some(obj) = merged.entry(field.clone()).or_default();\n384\t                    for (k, v) in inner {\n385\t                        if let Some(count) = v.as_u64() {\n386\t .into_iter()\n399\t            .map(|(k, v)| (k, serde_json::json!(v)))\n400\t            .collect();\n401\t        result.insert(field, serde_json::json!(inner_obj));\n402\t    }\n403\t\n404\t Index routes: GET, POST, DELETE /indexes\n//!\n//! Implements index lifecycle per plan §3:\n//! - Create broadcasts to all nodes + injects _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes\n//! - Settings sequential apply-with-rollback (Phase 5 / §13.5)\n//! - Delete broadcasts to all nodes\n//! - Stats aggregate numberOfDocuments + merge fieldDistribution\n\nuse axum::{\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n};\nuse miroir_core::{\n    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    router::write_targets,\n    scatter::{Scatter, ScatterRequest},\n};\nuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\nuse serde_json::Value;\n\nuse crate::{\n    error_response::ErrorResponse,\n    scatter::HttpScatter,\n    state::ProxyState,\n};\n\n/// Indexes router.\npub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n    axum::Router::new()\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::get(list_indexes).post(create_index))\n        .route(\"/:index\", axum::routing::get(get_index).delete(delete_index))\n        .route(\"/:index/stats\", axum::routing::get(get_index_stats))\n        .route(\"/:index/settings\", axum::routing::get(get_settings))\n}\n\n/// Index creation request.\n#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]\nstruct CreateIndexRequest {\n    uid: String,\n    primary_key: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Index metadata response.\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct IndexResponse {\n    uid: String,\n    primary_key: Option<String>,\n    created_at: String,\n    updated_at: String,\n}\n\n/// Index list response.\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\nstruct IndexListResponse {\n    results: Vec<IndexResponse>,\n}\n\n/// Index stats response.\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct IndexStatsResponse {\n    number_of_documents: u64,\n    is_indexing: bool,\n    field_distribution: Value,\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes - List all indexes.\nasync fn list_indexes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Query the first node in each replica group for index list\n    let results: Vec<serde_json::Value> = Vec::new();\n\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: \"/indexes\".to_string(),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter =\n                HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            let result = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n                    if let Some(arr) = json.get(\"results\").and_then(|r| r.as_array()) {\n                        // Return results from first successful group\n                        return Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({ \"results\": arr })));\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({ \"results\": results })))\n}\n\n/// POST /indexes - Create a new index.\nasync fn create_index(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    req: Json<CreateIndexRequest>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Broadcast to all nodes (use shard 0 as representative)\n    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n\n    if targets.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n    }\n\n    // Build request with _miroir_shard injected into filterableAttributes\n    let create_req = serde_json::json!({\n        \"uid\": req.uid,\n        \"primaryKey\": req.primary_key,\n    });\n\n    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&create_req).unwrap_or_default();\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n        path: \"/indexes\".to_string(),\n        body: body_bytes,\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n    let result = scatter\n        .scatter(&topology, targets.clone(), request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Check if creation succeeded on quorum\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n    let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n    if result.responses.len() < quorum {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\n            \"Failed to create index on quorum of nodes\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    // Return first response\n    let resp = result\n        .responses\n        .first()\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No response from nodes\"))?;\n\n    let status = axum::http::StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(axum::http::StatusCode::OK);\n\n    // After index creation, inject _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes\n    // We do this by updating the settings on all nodes\n    if status.is_success() {\n        let filterable_req = ScatterRequest {\n            method: \"PUT\".to_string(),\n            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings/filterable-attributes\", req.uid),\n            body: serde_json::to_vec(&serde_json::json!([\"_miroir_shard\"])).unwrap_or_default(),\n            headers: vec![],\n        };\n\n        let _ = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, targets.clone(), filterable_req, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n            .await;\n    }\n\n    let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n        .unwrap_or_else(|_| serde_json::json!({}));\n\n    Ok((status, Json(body)).into_response())\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index - Get index metadata.\nasync fn get_index(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Query the first available node\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}\", index),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter =\n                HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            let result = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                let status = resp.status;\n                if status == 200 {\n                    if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n                        return Ok(Json(json));\n                    }\n                } else if status == 404 {\n                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index));\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index))\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/:index - Delete an index.\nasync fn delete_index(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Broadcast to all nodes\n    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n\n    if targets.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n    }\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"DELETE\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}\", index),\n        body: vec![],\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n    let result = scatter\n        .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Check if deletion succeeded on quorum\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n    let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n    if result.responses.len() < quorum {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\n            \"Failed to delete index on quorum of nodes\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    // Return first response\n    let resp = result\n        .responses\n        .first()\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No response from nodes\"))?;\n\n    let status = axum::http::StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(axum::http::StatusCode::OK);\n\n    Ok((status, Json(resp.body.clone())).into_response())\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index/stats - Get index statistics.\nasync fn get_index_stats(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<IndexStatsResponse>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    let mut total_documents = 0u64;\n    let mut is_indexing = false;\n    let mut field_distributions: Vec<Value> = Vec::new();\n\n    // Aggregate stats from all replica groups\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/stats\", index),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter =\n                HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            if let Ok(result) = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n            {\n                if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                    if resp.status == 200 {\n                        // Parse response body as JSON\n                        if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n                            // Extract stats\n                            if let Some(docs) = json.get(\"numberOfDocuments\").and_then(|v| v.as_u64())\n                            {\n                                // Use max document count across replicas (more accurate)\n                                total_documents = total_documents.max(docs);\n                            }\n\n                            if let Some(indexing) = json.get(\"isIndexing\").and_then(|v| v.as_bool()) {\n                                is_indexing = is_indexing || indexing;\n                            }\n\n                            if let Some(fields) = json.get(\"fieldDistribution\") {\n                                field_distributions.push(fields.clone());\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Merge field distributions\n    let merged_fields = merge_field_distributions(field_distributions);\n\n    Ok(Json(IndexStatsResponse {\n        number_of_documents: total_documents,\n        is_indexing,\n        field_distribution: merged_fields,\n    }))\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index/settings - Get index settings.\nasync fn get_settings(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Query the first available node\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings\", index),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter =\n                HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            let result = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                let status = resp.status;\n                if status == 200 {\n                    return Ok(Json(resp.body.clone().into()));\n                } else if status == 404 {\n                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index));\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index))\n}\n\n/// Merge field distributions from multiple nodes.\nfn merge_field_distributions(distributions: Vec<Value>) -> Value {\n    use std::collections::HashMap;\n\n    let mut merged: HashMap<String, HashMap<String, u64>> = HashMap::new();\n\n    for dist in distributions {\n        if let Some(obj) = dist.as_object() {\n            for (field, value) in obj {\n                if let Some(inner) = value.as_object() {\n                    let entry = merged.entry(field.clone()).or_default();\n                    for (k, v) in inner {\n                        if let Some(count) = v.as_u64() {\n                            *entry.entry(k.clone()).or_insert(0) += count;\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Convert back to JSON\n    let mut result = serde_json::Map::new();\n    for (field, inner) in merged {\n        let inner_obj: serde_json::Map<String, Value> = inner\n            .into_iter()\n            .map(|(k, v)| (k, serde_json::json!(v)))\n            .collect();\n        result.insert(field, serde_json::json!(inner_obj));\n    }\n\n    serde_json::Value::Object(result)\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_create_index_request_deserialization() {\n        let json = r#\"{\n            \"uid\": \"test_index\",\n            \"primaryKey\": \"id\"\n        }\"#;\n\n        let req: CreateIndexRequest = serde_json::from_str(json).unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(req.uid, \"test_index\");\n        assert_eq!(req.primary_key, Some(\"id\".to_string()));\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_create_index_request_without_primary_key() {\n        let json = r#\"{\"uid\": \"test_index\"}\"#;\n\n        let req: CreateIndexRequest = serde_json::from_str(json).unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(req.uid, \"test_index\");\n        assert_eq!(req.primary_key, None);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_index_response_serialization() {\n        let response = IndexResponse {\n            uid: \"test\".to_string(),\n            primary_key: Some(\"id\".to_string()),\n            created_at: \"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z\".to_string(),\n            updated_at: \"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z\".to_string(),\n        };\n\n        let json = serde_json::to_string(&response).unwrap();\n        assert!(json.contains(r#\"\"uid\":\"test\"\"#));\n        assert!(json.contains(r#\"\"primaryKey\":\"id\"\"#));\n        assert!(json.contains(r#\"\"createdAt\":\"#));\n        assert!(json.contains(r#\"\"updatedAt\":\"#));\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_merge_field_distributions() {\n        let dist1 = serde_json::json!({\n            \"title\": {\"text\": 10},\n            \"description\": {\"text\": 5}\n        });\n\n        let dist2 = serde_json::json!({\n            \"title\": {\"text\": 7},\n            \"tags\": {\"array\": 3}\n        });\n\n        let merged = merge_field_distributions(vec![dist1, dist2]);\n\n        let Option<Value>,\n81\t    details: Option<Value>,\n82\t    duration: Option<String>,\n83\t    // Miroir-specific fields\n84\t    node_count: u32,\n85\t    nodes_completed: u32,\n86\t    nodes_failed: u32,\n87\t}\n88\t\n89\t/// Tasks list response.\n90\t#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n91\t#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\n92\tstruct TasksListResponse {\n93\t    results: Vec<AggregatedTask>,\n94\t    limit: usize,\n95\t    from: Option<u32>,\n96\t    total: u32,\n97\t}\n98\t\n99\t/// GET /tasks - List all tasks with optional filters.\n100\tasync fn list_tasks(\n101\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n102\t    Query(query): Query<TasksQuery>,\n103\t) -> Result<Json<TasksListResponse>, ErrorResponse> {\n104\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n105\t    let limit = query.limit.unwrap_or(20);\n106\t    let from = query.from;\n107\t\n108\t    // Query all nodes for tasks\n109\t    let mut all_tasks: Vec<NodeTask> = Vec::new();\n110\t    let mut failed_nodes = 0;\n111\t\n112\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n113\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n114\t            let request = ScatterRequest {\n115\t                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n116\t                path: \"/tasks\".to_string(),\n117\t                body: vec![],\n118\t                headers: vec![],\n119\t            };\n120\t\n121\t            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n122\t\n123\t            match scatter\n124\t                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n125\t                .await\n126\t            {\n127\t                Ok(result) => {\n128\t                    if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n129\t                        if resp.status == 200 {\n130\t                            if let Some(results) = resp.body.get(\"results\").and_then(|r| r.as_array()) {\n131\t                                for task_value in results {\n132\t                                    if let Ok(task) = serde_json::from_value::<NodeTask>(task_value.clone()) {\n133\t                                        all_tasks.push(task);\n134\t                                    }\n135\t                                }\n136\t                            }\n137\t                        }\n138\t                    }\n139\t                }\n140\t                Err(_) => {\n141\t                    failed_nodes += 1;\n142\t                }\n143\t            }\n144\t        }\n145\t    }\n146\t\n147\t    // Apply filters if provided\n148\t    let mut filtered_tasks: Vec<NodeTask> = all_tasks;\n149\t\n150\t    if let Some(index_uids) = &query.index_uid {\n151\t        if !index_uids.is_empty() {\n152\t            filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n153\t                .into_iter()\n154\t                .filter(|t| index_uids.contains(&t.index_uid))\n155\t                .collect();\n156\t        }\n157\t    }\n158\t\n159\t    if let Some(statuses) = &query.statuses {\n160\t        if !statuses.is_empty() {\n161\t            filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n162\t                .into_iter()\n163\t                .filter(|t| statuses.contains(&t.status))\n164\t                .collect();\n165\t        }\n166\t    }\n167\t\n168\t    if let Some(types) = &query.types {\n169\t        if !types.is_empty() {\n170\t            filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n171\t                .into_iter()\n172\t                .filter(|t| types.contains(&t.task_type))\n173\t                .collect();\n174\t        }\n175\t    }\n176\t\n177\t    // Aggregate tasks by UID\n178\t    let mut aggregated: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<NodeTask>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n179\t\n180\t    for task in filtered_tasks {\n181\t        aggregated\n182\t            .entry(task.task_uid as u32)\n183\t            .or_insert_with(Vec::new)\n184\t            .push(task);\n185\t    }\n186\t\n187\t    // Convert to aggregated tasks\n188\t    let mut results: Vec<AggregatedTask> = aggregated\n189\t        .into_iter()\n190\t        .map(|(uid, tasks)| {\n191\t            let first = tasks.first().unwrap();\n192\t\n193\t            // Determine overall status\n194\t            let status = if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"failed\") {\n195\t                \"failed\".to_string()\n196\t            } else if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"processing\") {\n197\t                \"processing\".to_string()\n198\t            } else if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"enqueued\") {\n199\t                \"enqueued\".to_string()\n200\t            } else {\n201\t                \"succeeded\".to_string()\n202\t            };\n203\t\n204\t            let nodes_completed = tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"succeeded\").count() as u32;\n205\t            let nodes_failed = tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"failed\").count() as u32;\n206\t\n207\t            AggregatedTask {\n208\t                task_uid: uid as u64,\n209\t                index_uid: first.index_uid.clone(),\n210\t                status,\n211\t                task_type: first.task_type.clone(),\n212\t                enqueued_at: first.enqueued_at.clone(),\n213\t                started_at: first.started_at.clone(),\n214\t                finished_at: first.finished_at.clone(),\n215\t                error: first.error.clone(),\n216\t                details: first.details.clone(),\n217\t                duration: first.duration.clone(),\n218\t                node_count: tasks.len() as u32,\n219\t                nodes_completed,\n220\t                nodes_failed,\n221\t            }\n222\t        })\n223\t        .collect();\n224\t\n225\t    // Sort by task UID descending\n226\t    results.sort_by(|a, b| b.task_uid.cmp(&a.task_uid));\n227\t\n228\t    // Apply from/limit pagination\n229\t    let total = results.len() as u32;\n230\t    if let Some(from_uid) = from {\n231\t        results = results.into_iter().filter(|t| t.task_uid <= from_uid as u64).collect();\n232\t    }\n233\t    results.truncate(limit);\n234\t\n235\t    Ok(Json(TasksListResponse {\n236\t        results,\n237\t        limit,\n238\t        from,\n239\t        total,\n240\t    }))\n241\t}\n242\t\n243\t/// GET /tasks/:uid - Get a specific task.\n244\tasync fn get_task(\n245\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n246\t    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n247\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n248\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n249\t\n250\t    // Parse task UID\n251\t    let #[serde(default)]\n    limit: Option<usize>,\n    #[serde(default)]\n    from: Option<u32>,\n    #[serde(default)]\n    index_uid: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    #[serde(default)]\n    statuses: Serialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct NodeTask {\n    task_uid: u64,\n    index_uid: String,\n    status: String,\n    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n    task_type: String,\n    enqueued_at: String,\n    started_at: Option<String>,\n    finished_at: Option<String>,\n    error: Option<Value>,\n    details: Option<Value>,\n    duration: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Aggregated task filters.\nasync fn list_tasks(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Query(query): Query<TasksQuery>,\n) -> Result<Json<TasksListResponse>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n    let limit = query.limit.unwrap_or(20);\n    let from = query.from;\n\n    // Query all nodes for tasks\n    let mut all_tasks: Vec<NodeTask> = Vec::new();\n    let mut failed_nodes = 0;\n\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: \"/tasks\".to_string(),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            match scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n            {\n                Ok(result) => {\n                    if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                        if resp.status == 200 {\n                            if let Some(results) = resp.body.get(\"results\").and_then(|r| r.as_array()) {\n                                for task_value in results {\n                                    if let Ok(task) = serde_json::from_value::<NodeTask>(task_value.clone()) {\n                                        all_tasks.push(task);\n                                    }\n                                }\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n                Err(_) => {\n                    failed_nodes += 1;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Apply filters if provided\n    let mut filtered_tasks: Vec<NodeTask> = all_tasks;\n\n    if let Some(index_uids) = &query.index_uid .collect();\n        }\n    }\n\n    if let Some(statuses) = &query.statuses {\n        if !statuses.is_empty() {\n            filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n                .into_iter()\n                .filter(|t| statuses.contains(&t.status))\n                .collect();\n        }\n    }\n\n    if let Some(types) = &query.types {\n        if !types.is_empty() {\n            filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n                .into_iter()\n                .filter(|t| types.contains(&t.task_type))\n                .collect();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Aggregate tasks by UID\n    let mut aggregated: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<NodeTask>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for task in filtered_tasks {\n        aggregated\n            .entry(task.task_uid as u32)\n            .or_insert_with(Vec::new)\n            .push(task);\n    }\n\n    // Convert to aggregated tasks\n    let mut results: Vec<AggregatedTask> = aggregated\n        .into_iter()\n        .map(|(uid, tasks)| {\n            let first = tasks.first().unwrap();\n\n            // Determine overall status\n            let status = if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"failed\") {\n                \"failed\".to_string()\n            } else if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"processing\") {\n                \"processing\".to_string()\n            } else if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"enqueued\") {\n                \"enqueued\".to_string()\n            } else {\n                \"succeeded\".to_string()\n            };\n\n            let nodes_completed = tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"succeeded\").count() as u32;\n            let nodes_failed = tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"failed\").count() as u32;\n\n            AggregatedTask {\n                task_uid: uid as u64,\n                index_uid: first.index_uid.clone(),\n                status,\n                task_type: first.task_type.clone(),\n                enqueued_at: first.enqueued_at.clone(),\n                started_at: first.started_at.clone(),\n                finished_at: first.finished_at.clone(),\n                error: first.error.clone(),\n                details: first.details.clone(),\n                duration: first.duration.clone(),\n                node_count: tasks.len() as u32,\n                nodes_completed,\n                nodes_failed,\n            }\n        })\n        .collect();\n\n    // Sort by task UID descending\n    results.sort_by(|a, b| b.task_uid.cmp(&a.task_uid));\n\n    // Apply from/limit pagination\n    let total = results.len() as u32;\n    if let Some(from_uid) = from {\n        results = results.into_iter().filter(|t| t.task_uid <= from_uid as u64).collect();\n    }\n    results.truncate(limit);\n\n    Ok(Json(TasksListResponse {\n        results,\n        limit,\n        from,\n        total,\n    }))\n}\n\n/// GET /tasks/:uid - Get a specific task.\nasync fn get_task(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Parse task UID\n    let task_uid = uid\n \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/tasks/{}\", task_uid),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            if let Ok(result) = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n            {\n                if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                    if resp.status == 200 {\n                        not_found = false;\n                        if let Ok(task) = serde_json::from_value::<NodeTask>(resp.body.clone()) {\n                            node_tasks.push(task);\n                        }\n                    } else if resp.status == 404 {\n                        // Task not found on this node\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    if Err(ErrorResponse::invalid_request(format!(\"Task {} not found\", uid)));\n    }\n\n    // Aggregate task status\n    let first = node_tasks.first().unwrap();\n    let status = if node_tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"failed\") {\n        \"failed\".to_string()\n    } else if node_tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"processing\") {\n        \"processing\".to_string()\n    } else if node_tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"enqueued\") {\n        \"enqueued\".to_string()\n    } else {\n        \"succeeded\".to_string()\n    };\n\n    let nodes_completed = first.details.clone(),\n        duration: first.duration.clone(),\n        node_count: node_tasks.len() as u32,\n        nodes_completed,\n        nodes_failed,\n    };\n\n    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::OK, Json(aggregated)).into_response())\n}\n\n/// DELETE /tasks/:uid - Cancel/delete a task.\nasync fn delete_task(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Search route: POST /indexes/:index/search\n//!\n//! Implements the read path per plan §2:\n//! - Pick group via query_seq % RG\n//! - Build intra-group covering set\n//! - Scatter search to covering set nodes\n//! - Merge by _rankingScore\n//! - Strip _miroir_shard always + _rankingScore if not requested\n//! - Aggregate facets + estimatedTotalHits\n//! - Report max processingTimeMs\n//! - Group fallback when covering set has holes\n\nuse axum::{\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    http::HeaderValue,\n    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n};\nuse miroir_core::{\n    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    merger::{Merger, MergerImpl, #[serde(rename = \"rankingScoreThreshold\")]\n    ranking_score_threshold: Option<f64>,\n    #[serde(rename = \"matchingStrategy\")]\n    matching_strategy: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Search response body (Meilisearch format).\n#[derive(Debug, serde::Serialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct SearchResponse {\n    hits: Vec<Value>,\n    query: String,\n    limit: usize,\n    offset: Option<f64>,\n}\n\n/// Attempt a search with a specific replica group.\n///\n/// Returns (shard_responses, any_degraded, failed_shard_ids)\nasync fn search_with_group(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    topology: &miroir_core::topology::Topology,\n    group_id: u32,\n    index: &str,\n    req_body: &[u8],\n    query_seq: u64,\n    _limit: usize,\n    _offset: usize,\n    _client_requested_score: bool,\n    _facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n) -> Result<(Vec<CoreShardResponse>, bool, Vec<u32>), ErrorResponse> {\n    let group = topology\n        .group(group_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\"Group {} not found\", group_id)))?;\n\n    // Build covering set for all shards\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n    let shard_count = state.config.shards;\n    let covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/search\", index),\n        body: req_body.to_vec(),\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    // Scatter search to all nodes in covering set\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n    let result = scatter\n        .scatter(topology, covering.clone(), request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Build shard responses for merger\n    let mut shard_responses: Vec<CoreShardResponse> = Vec::new();\n    let mut any_degraded = false;\n    let mut failed_shard_ids: Vec<u32> = Vec::new();\n\n    // Group responses by node\n    let mut responses_by_node: std::collections::HashMap<String, serde_json::Value> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for resp in result.responses {\n        let node_id = resp.node_id.as_str().to_string();\n        responses_by_node.insert(node_id, resp.body.into());\n    }\n\n    // For each shard, find the response from its assigned node\n    for (shard_id, node_id) in covering.iter().enumerate() {\n        let node_id_str = node_id.as_str().to_string();\n\n        if let Some(body) = responses_by_node.get(&node_id_str) {\n            shard_responses.push(CoreShardResponse {\n                shard_id: shard_id as u32,\n                body: body.clone(),\n                success: true,\n            });\n        } else {\n            // No response from this node's shard\n            shard_responses.push(CoreShardResponse {\n                shard_id: shard_id as u32,\n                body: serde_json::json!({}),\n                success: false,\n            });\n            failed_shard_ids.push(shard_id as u32);\n            any_degraded = true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok((shard_responses, any_degraded, failed_shard_ids))\n}\n\n/// POST /indexes/:index/search - Search documents.\nasync fn search(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    req: Json<SearchRequest>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n    let query_seq = state.next_query_seq();\n\n    // Extract query before moving req.0\n    let query_value = req.q.clone();\n\n    // Build request body for nodes\n    let req_body = serde_json::to_vec(&req.0).unwrap_or_default();\n\n    let offset = req.offset.unwrap_or(0);\n    let limit = req.limit.unwrap_or(20);\n    let client_requested_score = req.show_ranking_score.unwrap_or(false);\n    let facets = req.facets.clone();\n\n    // Try the primary group first\n    let primary_group_id = query_group(query_seq, state.config.replica_groups);\n    let (mut shard_responses, mut any_degraded, mut failed_shard_ids) = search_with_group(\n        &state,\n        &topology,\n        primary_group_id,\n        &index,\n        &req_body,\n        query_seq,\n        limit,\n        offset,\n        client_requested_score,\n        facets,\n    )\n    .await?;\n\n    // If we have failed shards and there are other replica groups, try group fallback\n    if !failed_shard_ids.is_empty() && state.config.replica_groups > 1 {\n        let replica_groups = state.config.replica_groups;\n        let mut fallback_attempts = 0;\n        const MAX_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS: u32 = 2; // Limit fallback attempts to avoid cascading\n\n        // Try other groups for the failed shards\n        for fallback_offset in 1..replica_groups as u64 {\n            if fallback_attempts >= MAX_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS {\n                break;\n            }\n\n            let fallback_group_id = (primary_group_id as u64 + fallback_offset) % replica_groups as u64;\n            if fallback_group_id == primary_group_id as u64 {\n                continue;\n            }\n\n            // Try the fallback group for all failed shards\n            let (fallback_responses, fallback_degraded, fallback_failed) = search_with_group(\n                &state,\n                &topology,\n                fallback_group_id as u32,\n                &index,\n                &req_body,\n                query_seq,\n                limit,\n                offset,\n                client_requested_score,\n                facets.clone(),\n            )\n            .await?;\n\n            // Merge the successful responses from fallback into our main responses\n            for (i, shard_resp) in shard_responses.iter_mut().enumerate() {\n                let shard_id = i as u32;\n                if !shard_resp.success && failed_shard_ids.contains(&shard_id) {\n                    // Try to find a successful response from fallback\n                    if let Some(fallback_resp) = fallback_responses.iter().find(|r| r.shard_id == shard_id && r.success) {\n                        shard_resp.body = fallback_resp.body.clone();\n                        shard_resp.success = true;\n                        // Remove from failed list\n                        failed_shard_ids.retain(|&id| id != shard_id);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            if fallback_degraded {\n                any_degraded = true;\n            }\n\n            // Update failed_shard_ids with any new failures from fallback\n            for &shard_id in &fallback_failed {\n                if !failed_shard_ids.contains(&shard_id) {\n                    failed_shard_ids.push(shard_id);\n                }\n            }\n\n            fallback_attempts += 1;\n\n            // If we've recovered all failed shards, stop trying fallbacks\n            if failed_shard_ids.is_empty() {\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Check if we failed completely\n    let successful_count = shard_responses.iter().filter(|s| s.success).count();\n    if successful_count == 0 {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"All shards failed\"));\n    }\n\n    // Merge results\n    let merger = MergerImpl;\n    let merged: MergedResult = merger\n        .merge(shard_responses, offset, limit, client_requested_score)\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Check if any shards failed (degraded mode)\n    let degraded = any_degraded || merged.degraded;\n\n    // Build response\n    let search_response = SearchResponse {\n        hits: merged.hits,\n        query: query_value.unwrap_or_default(),\n        limit,\n        offset,\n        estimated_total_hits: merged.total_hits,\n        processing_time_ms: merged.processing_time_ms,\n        facet_distribution: if merged.facets.as_object().map_or(false, |o| !o.is_empty()) {\n            Some(merged.facets)\n        } else {\n            None\n        },\n        ranking_score_threshold: req.ranking_score_threshold,\n    };\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(200);\n\n    // Add degraded header if any shard failed\n    if degraded {\n        if let Ok(val) = .body(Json(search_response).into_response().into_body())\n        .unwrap())\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_search_request_deserialization() {\n HTTP scatter-gather execution for Meilisearch nodes.\n\nuse crate::client::NodeClient;\nuse crate::retry_cache::{CachedResponse, RetryCache};\nuse async_trait::async_trait;\nuse miroir_core::config::UnavailableShardPolicy;\nuse miroir_core::scatter::{NodeResponse, Scatter, ScatterRequest, ScatterResponse};\nuse miroir_core::topology::{NodeId, Topology};\nuse miroir_core::{MiroirError, Result};\nuse std::time::Duration;\nuse tokio::time::timeout;\n\n/// HTTP scatter implementation using NodeClient.\n#[derive(Clone)]\npub struct HttpScatter {\n    client: NodeClient,\n    node_timeout_ms: u64,\n    /// Retry cache for idempotency (plan §4).\n    retry_cache: Option<RetryCache>,\n}\n\nimpl HttpScatter {\n    pub fn new(client: NodeClient, node_timeout_ms: u64) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            client,\n            node_timeout_ms,\n            retry_cache: None,\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Create a new HttpScatter with retry cache enabled.\n    pub fn with_retry_cache(client: NodeClient, node_timeout_ms: u64, retry_cache: RetryCache) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            client,\n            node_timeout_ms,\n            retry_cache: Some(retry_cache),\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Send a request to a single node with retry cache lookup.\n    async fn send_to_node_with_cache(\n        &self,\n        topology: &Topology,\n        node_id: &NodeId,\n        method: &str,\n        path: &str,\n        body: &[u8],\n        headers: &[(String, String)],\n    ) -> Result<miroir_core::scatter::NodeResponse> {\n        // Check retry cache first if enabled\n        if let Some(ref cache) = self.retry_cache {\n            let cache_key = RetryCache::cache_key(body, node_id.as_str(), None);\n\n            if let Some(cached) = cache.get(&cache_key).await {\n                // Return cached response\n                return Ok(NodeResponse {\n                    node_id: node_id.clone(),\n                    body: cached.body,\n                    status: cached.status,\n                    headers: Vec::new(),\n                });\n            }\n        }\n\n        // No cache hit, send actual request\n        let timeout_dur = Duration::from_millis(self.node_timeout_ms);\n        let result = timeout(timeout_dur, async {\n            self.client\n                .send_to_node(topology, node_id, method, path, Some(body), headers)\n                .await\n        })\n        .await;\n\n        match result {\n            Ok(Ok(resp)) => {\n                let body_bytes = resp.body;\n                let status = resp.status;\n\n                // Cache successful responses\n                if let Some(ref cache) = self.retry_cache {\n                    // Cache only 2xx responses\n                    if (200..300).contains(&status) {\n                        let cache_key = RetryCache::cache_key(body, node_id.as_str(), None);\n                        let cached = CachedResponse {\n                            body: body_bytes.clone(),\n                            status,\n                            cached_at: std::time::Instant::now(),\n                        };\n                        cache.put(cache_key, cached).await;\n                    }\n                }\n\n                Ok(miroir_core::scatter::NodeResponse {\n                    node_id: node_id.clone(),\n                    body: body_bytes,\n                    status,\n                    headers: resp.headers,\n                })\n            }\n            _ => Err(MiroirError::Routing(format!(\n                \"request to node {} timed out\",\n                node_id.as_str()\n            ))),\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n#[async_trait]\nimpl Scatter for HttpScatter {\n    async fn scatter(\n        &self,\n        topology: &Topology,\n        nodes: Vec<NodeId>,\n        request: ScatterRequest,\n        policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    ) -> Result<ScatterResponse> {\n        // Fan out requests to all nodes in parallel\n        let futures: Vec<_> = nodes\n            .iter()\n            .map(|node_id| {\n                let node_id = node_id.clone();\n                let method = request.method.clone();\n                let path = request.path.clone();\n                let body = request.body.clone();\n                let headers = request.headers.clone();\n                let this = self.clone();\n                let topo = topology.clone();\n\n                async move {\n                    match this.send_to_node_with_cache(\n                        &topo,\n                        &node_id,\n                        &method,\n                        &path,\n                        &body,\n                        &headers,\n                    )\n                    .await\n                    {\n                        Ok(resp) => Ok(resp),\n                        Err(_) => Err(node_id),\n                    }\n                }\n            })\n            .collect();\n\n        let results = futures::future::join_all(futures).await;\n\n        let mut successful = Vec::new();\n        let mut failed = Vec::new();\n\n        for result in results {\n            match result {\n                Ok(resp) => successful.push(resp),\n                Err(node_id) => failed.push(node_id),\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Check if we should fail based on policy\n        if policy == UnavailableShardPolicy::Error && !failed.is_empty() {\n            return Err(MiroirError::Routing(format!(\n                \"{} nodes failed: {:?}\",\n                failed.len(),\n                failed\n            )));\n        }\n\n        Ok(ScatterResponse {\n            responses: successful,\n            failed,\n        })\n    }\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n    use miroir_core::topology::{Node, Topology};\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_http_scatter_empty_nodes() {\n        let client = NodeClient::new(\"test-key\".to_string(), &Default::default());\n        let scatter = HttpScatter::new(client, 1000);\n        let topology = Topology::new(64, 1);\n\n        let request = ScatterRequest {\n            body: Vec::new(),\n            headers: Vec::new(),\n            method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n            path: \"/\".to_string(),\n        };\n\n        let result = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, Vec::new(), request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n            .await\n            .unwrap();\n\n        assert!(result.responses.is_empty());\n        assert!(result.failed.is_empty());\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_http_scatter_timeout_handling() {\n        let client = NodeClient::new(\"test-key\".to_string(), &Default::default());\n        let scatter = HttpScatter::new(client, 1); // 1ms timeout\n        let mut topology = Topology::new(64, 1);\n\n        // Add a node that will timeout\n        topology.add_node(Node::new(\n            NodeId::new(\"test-node\".to_string()),\n            \"http://invalid.example.com:7700\".to_string(),\n            0,\n        ));\n\n        let request = ScatterRequest {\n            body: Vec::new(),\n            headers: Vec::new(),\n            method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n            path: \"/\".to_string(),\n        };\n\n        let result = scatter\n            .scatter(\n                &topology,\n                vec![NodeId::new(\"test-node\".to_string())],\n                request,\n                UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial,\n            )\n            .await\n            .unwrap();\n\n        assert!(result.responses.is_empty());\n        assert_eq!(result.failed.len(), 1);\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_http_scatter_error_policy() {\n        let client = NodeClient::new(\"test-key\".to_string(), &Default::default());\n        let scatter = HttpScatter::new(client,
